title: OCI permission denied with overlay volumes and userns=auto
body:
### Issue Description

Mounting an overlayfs over a volume does not work with userns=auto.

### Steps to reproduce the issue

Steps to reproduce the issue
1. `podman run --rm -it --userns auto -v tmp:/mnt:O docker.io/alpine`

### Describe the results you received

```
Error: crun: mount `/var/lib/containers/storage/overlay-containers/11f4444c60d0d3976cae9bee233686f701282cf631570a34297cf19702630a49/userdata/overlay/1283347922/merge` to `mnt`: Permission denied: OCI permission denied
```

### Describe the results you expected

Successfully starting the container.

No

### Privileged Or Rootless

Privileged

### Upstream Latest Release

No

### Additional environment details

Fedora CoreOS on baremetal x86-64, crun was upgraded:
```
● ostree-image-signed:docker://quay.io/fedora/fedora-coreos:stable
```

### Additional information

The following issue might be related: https://github.com/containers/podman/issues/23211
